title: Underdog
description: A complete overhaul of Minecraft's survival mode with an emphasis on realism and ecology.
body:
A complete overhaul of Minecraft's survival mode with an emphasis on realism and ecology.


##### ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/juraj-hrivnak/Underdog/main/.github/border.png) ### Features ◼️ Realism pushed to the edge of possibilities. ◼️ Detailed quest book to guide you through the overhauled progression. ◼️ Thousands of recipe changes. ◼️ Interconnected mod progression. ◼️ Guidebook to help you learn all the new game mechanics. ◼️ Majestic world generation based on the real world. ◼️ Salt and fresh water generation. ◼️ Custom mods and resource packs are made for the pack. ◼️ Huge attention to detail, quality of life and performance. ◼️ And so much more... ##### ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/juraj-hrivnak/Underdog/main/.github/border.png) ### Modlist ##### 🌿 = Custom mod ##### 🍴 = Custom mod fork ### Main progression mods ##### Pyrotech (Early-game), Immersive Engineering + addons (Mid-game), Mekanism (Late-game.) ### Other progression mods ##### Tinkers Construct + addons (Early-game/mid-game); Forestry (Mid-game); Logistic Pipes (Mid-game); ##### Industrial Foregoing (Mid-game/late-game); AE2 Unofficial Extended Life (Late-game.) ### World generation mods ##### Biomes O' Plenty; Realistic Terrain Generation - Unofficial🍴; Dynamic Trees + addons; Cave Generator; ##### Divergent Underground + addons🌿; Greenery🌿; Even More Realistic Ore Veins🍴; Biome Tweaker. ### Survival mods ##### SimpleDifficulty for Underdog🍴; Weather, Storms & Tornadoes; Serene Seasons; Realistic Block Physics; ##### Somnia Awoken; Nutrition. ##### ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/juraj-hrivnak/Underdog/main/.github/banner7.png) ##### The best place to set up a server to play the Underdog modpack is at: [https://bisecthosting.com/underdog](https://bisecthosting.com/underdog) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/juraj-hrivnak/Underdog/main/.github/border.png)
